class FeatureFlags:
    def is_enabled(self, flag_name):
        return os.getenv(flag_name) == "true"

flags = FeatureFlags()

@app.get("/v1")
def handler_one():
    # Correct: feature flags checked via a centralized abstraction
    if flags.is_enabled("ENABLE_NEW_V1"):
        return "New V1"
    return "Old V1"
